scripts.ingest:lausanne: pnpm run ingest:lausanne:buildings && pnpm run ingest:lausanne:terrain:ch && pnpm run ingest:lausanne:vegetation:surface && pnpm run ingest:lausanne:terrain:horizon && pnpm run ingest:lausanne:places
scripts.ingest:nyon: pnpm run ingest:nyon:buildings && pnpm run ingest:nyon:terrain:ch && pnpm run ingest:nyon:vegetation:surface && pnpm run ingest:nyon:terrain:horizon && pnpm run ingest:nyon:places
scripts.ingest:all: pnpm run ingest:lausanne && pnpm run ingest:nyon
scripts.preprocess: pnpm run preprocess:buildings:index && pnpm run preprocess:horizon:mask
scripts.fetch:lausanne:3d: pnpm run ingest:lausanne:buildings && pnpm run ingest:lausanne:terrain:ch && pnpm run ingest:lausanne:vegetation:surface && pnpm run ingest:lausanne:terrain:horizon && pnpm run preprocess
scripts.fetch:nyon:3d: pnpm run ingest:nyon:buildings && pnpm run ingest:nyon:terrain:ch && pnpm run ingest:nyon:vegetation:surface && pnpm run ingest:nyon:terrain:horizon && pnpm run preprocess:buildings:index
scripts.fetch:all:models: pnpm run ingest:all && pnpm run preprocess
scripts.setup:lausanne: pnpm run ingest:lausanne && pnpm run preprocess
scripts.setup:nyon: pnpm run ingest:nyon && pnpm run preprocess
